## Source: Cautun et al. (2014), MNRAS 445, 1820
## doi: 10.1093/mnras/stu1829
## Cautun fit for subhalo velocity function within R100c
## Columns: log10(nu)  log10(N(>nu))  where nu = Vmax/V200

-0.33758	-0.29941
-0.2421	-0.60999
-0.19913	-0.82855
-0.15098	-1.08162
